svg.text: Data flow from Enterprise Data Platform through ML infrastructure to serving
Analytical heart -- historical, governed, integrated data
Customer 360 · Risk Analytics · ML Features · Executive MI
Batch jobs, full dataset recomputation, scheduled runs
Sub-millisecond lookups, pre-materialized, cached in memory
Parquet, Delta Lake, Iceberg -- optimized for scan throughput
Redis, DynamoDB, Bigtable -- optimized for point lookups
Gold-layer tables, data products, full history available
Materialized from offline store, pushed to low-latency serving
Maximize data processed per unit time, bulk read patterns
Thousands of concurrent requests, horizontal auto-scaling
Scheduled pipelines, daily or hourly refreshes from EDP
